principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Motorsport Telemetry with SaaS Utility
Emotion First: Every interaction feels like a gear shift or a pit stop
Content is King: Data is the hero, presented with broadcast clarity
Contrast: Deep blacks vs. Neon accents for maximum readability

usage_rules.h1: font-unbounded font-bold text-5xl md:text-7xl tracking-tighter uppercase text-white
usage_rules.h2: font-unbounded font-semibold text-3xl md:text-4xl tracking-tight text-white
usage_rules.label: font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-zinc-500

containers.dashboard_card: bg-[#0F0F10] border border-white/5 p-6 rounded-xl relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-primary/30 transition-colors

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-unbounded font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-primary/90 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,240,255,0.4)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 text-white border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white/20 font-inter

cards.telemetry: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 p-5 rounded-lg relative before:absolute before:top-0 before:left-0 before:w-full before:h-[1px] before:bg-gradient-to-r before:from-transparent before:via-primary/50 before:to-transparent
cards.feature: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-zinc-900/50 border border-white/10 p-8 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-black/50 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 rounded-md h-12

navigation.sidebar: bg-[#050505] border-r border-white/10 w-64 hidden md:flex flex-col
navigation.navbar: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full border-b border-white/10 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-xl

hero_background.usage: Landing Page Hero Background with heavy dark overlay

skill_tracking.usage: Skill Gap Analysis Section / Technical Training

certification.alt: Close up of sports car front

libraries.charts: Recharts (customized with neon strokes and dark backgrounds)

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
2. THEME: Force 'dark' class on the html element in index.html or App.js. The app is Dark Mode ONLY.
3. TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to include the new colors (primary: #00F0FF, secondary: #7000FF) and fonts (Unbounded, Inter).
4. COMPONENTS: When using Shadcn components, override the default 'radius' to be smaller (0.3rem) and borders to be darker (white/10).
5. LAYOUT: Use the 'Bento Grid' strategy for the Dashboard. Avoid equal-width columns. Make the 'Gap Analysis' chart the dominant element.
6. IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs. Apply a 'grayscale' filter with 'hover:grayscale-0' transition for a dramatic effect in lists.
7. GLASSMORPHISM: Use the 'glass' utility class defined in visual_enhancers for all floating panels (Nav, Modals, Toasts).
8. DATA-TESTID: Ensure every interactive element has a data-testid attribute (e.g., 'login-btn', 'nfc-scan-trigger').
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic 'AI slop' designs. No centered text blocks without purpose.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical. 'p-8' is the new 'p-4'.
Never use pure black (#000000) for backgrounds, use #050505.
Always add hover states to interactive elements (color shift + subtle lift).
Use 'sonner' for toasts, not default alerts.
